seasonal_notes.summer: Dec-Feb is peak season — book accommodation 3-6 months ahead, activities 3-4 weeks ahead
seasonal_notes.shoulder: Oct-Nov and Mar-Apr offer 15-25% lower prices with similar weather
seasonal_notes.winter: Jun-Aug is cheapest for accommodation; ski fields open at Queenstown, Wanaka, Ruapehu
seasonal_notes.spring: Sep-Oct: some operators still on winter hours; weather improving rapidly
